name: NI Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I All dollar amounts, except per share amounts, are in thousands. Overview NI Holdings is a North Dakota business corporation that is the stock holding company of Nodak Insurance Company and became such in connection with the conversion of Nodak Mutual Insurance Company (Nodak Mutual) from a mutual to stock form of organization and the creation of a mutual holding company. The conversion was completed on March 13, 2017. Immediately following the conversion, all of the outstanding shares of ...
